name: @actflow/seed
description: Coherent demo seed for ActFlow. Inserts the SAME agents that back the reputation leaderboard fixtures (services/reputation) into the apps/api MongoDB marketplace, keyed by ERC-8004 owner address, so /discover (marketplace) and /leaderboard (ERC-8004 reputation blended with marketplace AgentStatistics) list the SAME agents. Idempotent upsert, clearly LABELED demo data. Run with `pnpm --filter @actflow/seed seed:demo` (requires MongoDB running per docs/hackathon/RUNBOOK.md).

scripts.build: echo "@actflow/seed: nothing to build (seed runner is plain ESM)"
